summary: Iteration 33 - Testing Residencia Creation Forms. Backend: 9/9 tests PASS (100%). Admin Panel 'Nueva Residencia' modal has ALL required fields. Provider Dashboard profile form with new fields EXISTS in code but is NOT accessible (missing 'profile' tab in navigation). Search page with service type filters works correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Profile form with all fields (Nombre, Dirección, Región, Comuna, Teléfono, Precio, Place ID, Sitio Web, Facebook, Instagram) exists in code at line 268-414 for activeTab='profile', but 'profile' tab is NOT included in the navigation tabs array at line 246-265. The profile section is inaccessible.
Profile form is missing fields: Region, Place ID, Precio, Social Links (Website, Facebook, Instagram). Only has: business_name, description, phone, address, comuna.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/admin/residencias/create - Creates residence with all fields (business_name, email, phone, address, region, comuna, website, facebook, instagram, price_from, place_id, service_type)
PUT /api/providers/my-profile - Updates profile with region, place_id, price_from fields
frontend_ui_tests: ADMIN PANEL - Nueva Residencia Modal: ALL 12 fields present (Nombre*, Correo*, Dirección, Región, Comuna, Teléfono, Precio, Sitio Web, Facebook, Instagram, Place ID, Tipo de Servicio)
ADMIN PANEL - Form fills and submits correctly
SEARCH PAGE - All 4 filter tabs visible (Todos, Residencias, Cuidado a Domicilio, Salud Mental)
SEARCH PAGE - Filter tabs clickable and functional
SEARCH PAGE - Shows 50 providers with images
PROVIDER DASHBOARD - Servicios tab shows Social Links inputs (Instagram, Facebook, Website)

action_items: HIGH PRIORITY: Add 'profile' tab to ProviderDashboard.jsx navigation (line 246-265). Add: { key: 'profile', label: 'Editar Perfil', icon: Settings } to the tabs array. This will expose the existing profile form with all fields.
ALTERNATIVE: Update ProviderAccount.jsx (/provider/account) profileForm state (line 32-34) to include: region, place_id, price_from. Also add social_links state and corresponding form fields.
critical_code_review_comments: ProviderDashboard.jsx: Profile form code exists (lines 268-414) with all required fields but is unreachable - 'profile' not in tabs array (lines 246-265)
ProviderAccount.jsx: profileForm state only has 5 fields (business_name, description, phone, address, comuna) - missing region, place_id, price_from, social_links

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Admin form 100%, Provider profile form inaccessible (code exists but tab missing)

seed_data_creation: 3 test residencias created during backend tests (will have TEST_ prefix emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33: Backend fully working - all residencia creation/update endpoints work with all new fields. Admin Panel 'Nueva Residencia' modal has all 12 fields and works. ISSUE: ProviderDashboard profile form with all fields (Región, Place ID, Precio, Social Links) exists in code but is inaccessible because 'profile' tab is missing from navigation. Quick fix: Add 'profile' to tabs array at line 246 in ProviderDashboard.jsx.

mocked_apis.google_maps: Shows 'Mapa no disponible' on search page - intentionally disabled

rca_of_the_issue: The main agent added the profile form with all fields to ProviderDashboard.jsx (lines 268-414) but did not add the 'profile' tab to the visible navigation array (lines 246-265). The tabs array only includes: contact-requests, amenities, requests, bookings. The profile form requires activeTab === 'profile' which is never set because there's no button/tab to trigger it.
